recommendations: Use OCR with redaction for images containing text
result.description: Access Card Reader — A device used with ID/badge cards to control door entry; typically mounted near a doorway and operated by swiping/tapping the card.
keyFindings: Digital access control using ID/employee cards
Automates entry tracking via time-stamping when card is used
Dependent on card validity and system integrity (lost/borrowed cards are a risk)
